nodes.name: 黄眉柳莺
nodes.summary: 黄眉柳莺（Yellow-browed warbler，学名 Phylloscopus inornatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The nest is built in dense vegetation often at the base of a tree or old stump; two to four (occasionally more) eggs are laid, hatching after 11–14 days, with the chicks fledging when 12–13 days old. This is an abundant bird of lowland and montane forests and woodlands; particularly in winter it may also be found in more open woods
